html:
Exclusive to:

The Sleek Hat is a craftable Hat Item in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Dress Tab, requires a Coconut, 2 Vines and a Shark Fin to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The hat, when worn, makes the Player Speed 25% faster (similar to the speed of the Walking Cane), and provides 50% resistance against Strong Winds. It lasts 3 Days when worn, a Sewing Kit repairs it to full durability. The increased speed also applies to boats while sailing.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Willow wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Wendy wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • WX-78 wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Woodie wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Wes wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Maxwell wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Webber wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Walani wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Warly wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Wilbur wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Wilba wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Wormwood wearing a Sleek Hat.
  • Wheeler wearing a Sleek Hat.

"aerodynamichat"
“It really cuts through the air!”
–Wilson
“Brisk movement snuffs fires.”
–Willow
“Keeps mighty legs free to run!”
–Wolfgang
“I cut through the air!”
–Wendy
“THE INTERSECTION OF AERODYNAMICS AND FASHION”

“Somewhat prehistoric looking.”

“It's a speed toque.”
–Woodie

–Maxwell
“Incredible. It's worn on the head, yet affects the whole body.”
–Wagstaff
“My head shall cut the air!”
–Wigfrid
“We feel light on our feet.”
–Webber
“Aerodynamic. Choka.”
–Walani
“Speeds me on my way.”
–Warly
“Cuts me walkin' time in half!”
–Woodlegs
“HATH ZOOM POWERS”
–Wilba
“Zoomie head thing”
–Wormwood
“I wonder if this would work on my balloon too.”
–Wheeler
The Sleek Hat is a craftable Hat Item in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Dress Tab, requires a Coconut, 2 Vines and a Shark Fin to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The hat, when worn, makes the Player Speed 25% faster (similar to the speed of the Walking Cane), and provides 50% resistance against Strong Winds. It lasts 3 Days when worn, a Sewing Kit repairs it to full durability. The increased speed also applies to boats while sailing.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Kiểu Dáng Đẹp là một Vật Phẩm Mũ có thể chế tạo được trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Trang Phục, yêu cầu Dừa, 2 Dây Leo và Vây Cá Mập để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để nguyên mẫu. Chiếc mũ khi đội sẽ giúp Tốc độ của Người chơi nhanh hơn 25% (tương tự như tốc độ của Gậy Đi Bộ) và cung cấp 50% khả năng chống lại Gió Mạnh. Nó tồn tại được 3 ngày khi bị mòn, Bộ dụng cụ may vá sẽ sửa chữa nó để có độ bền tối đa. Tốc độ tăng lên cũng áp dụng cho thuyền khi đi thuyền.

The '''Sleek Hat''' is a craftable [[:Category:Hats|Hat]] [[Item]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Dress|Dress Tab]], requires a [[Coconut]], 2 [[Vine]]s and a [[Shark Fin]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. The hat, when worn, makes the [[Player Speed]] 25% faster (similar to the speed of the [[Walking Cane]]), and provides 50% resistance against [[Strong Winds]]. It lasts 3 [[Day]]s when worn, a [[Sewing Kit]] repairs it to full durability. The increased speed also applies to  boats while sailing.
